headline: Postdoctoral Researchers
description: Opportunities for researchers interested in AI for materials, quantum computing workflows, multiscale simulation, and virtual characterization.

jobs.title: Postdoc Fellowships
items: Director's Postdoc Fellow and Distinguished Postdoc Fellow pathways
CNLS postdoctoral fellowships for exceptional candidates
Oppenheimer postdoctoral fellowships for outstanding applicants
Research areas: physics-guided AI, atomistic simulation, materials informatics, quantum computing, and autonomous workflows
jobs.note: Send your CV and a brief statement of research interests. Include 2-3 representative papers if available.

headline: Graduate Students
description: Graduate research opportunities are available through LANL student programs, fellowships, and collaborative university projects.

jobs.title: Graduate Research Opportunities
items: LANL graduate student appointments and summer research pathways
Topics include machine learning interatomic potentials, process-structure-property modeling, and AI agents for scientific workflows
jobs.note: Interested graduate students should send a short research-interest note, CV, and expected availability.

headline: Undergraduate Students
description: Undergraduate internships are suitable for students interested in computational materials science, Python-based scientific software, AI/ML, and simulation analysis.

jobs.title: Undergraduate Internships
items: LANL summer student and undergraduate research opportunities
Projects may include data analysis, molecular simulation workflows, visualization, and ML model development
jobs.note: Please include your CV/resume, coursework or coding experience, and preferred research topics.
